item.title: NO, YOU MOVE.
item.description: “Doesn't matter what the press says. Doesn't matter what the politicians or the mobs say. Doesn't matter if the whole country decides that something wrong is something right. This nation was founded on one principle above all else: The requirement that we stand up for what we believe, no matter the odds or the consequences. When the mob and the press and the whole world tell you to move, your job is to plant yourself like a tree beside the river of truth, and tell the whole world -- "No, YOU move.” SEMPER FI DEVIL DOG
item.dc:creator: TheRealSauceBoss

item.title: PTGDump: Memes I Send My Wife Vol. XIV
item.description:
Hello everyone! Hope y'all had some *really good* coffee this morning.
Cross-post from my fitness meme folder.
Female rage will save us all.
It gives me the happy chemicals.
It's basic science!
This basically happened last week. Artist is @murrzstudio
This dump is very cat-centric, I'm realizing.
Wife is a redhead. Mornings are like this sometimes.
What's your dream Lego set?
What service! 5/7 stars!
Her when I send a picture of me in my hoochie daddy cargo jorts.
Cross-post from my feisty memes folder.
"It's not hungry, or even sleepy. It's like my heart is hard." - Gob Bluth
Brilliant.
Kinda true, although the cat sleeps down by my feet, despite the 20% chance of getting shoved off the bed by accident when I turn over.
Like she needs me to tell her that. But I supply enough whimsy for the both of us.
What movie they watching?
Can we go for 38nt?
Her fault. Not mine.
Never calm them. Keep them feral and wily.
I'm really just a silly little guy.
We have a friend who does pottery, and makes really cool mugs. Not a plug, but she'd be down to make something like this.
Better be some slightly bigger than medium-sized donuts, knowwhatImean?
*Smooch*
Whoops, married. It's a slippery slope.
Everyone must enjoy this modern Rice
We went on an amazing date last week when the kid was at a sleepover. Dinner and drinks, home by 8, in bed by 8:45. Perfect.
30 minutes? What am I, a machine?
Another cross-post from my fitness meme folder. Fuck skinny. Stay furious and jacked, ladies.
It does not go well when we try to assemble things as a family.
Thanks for reading everyone! This dump has been brought to you by... ...my gaming channel on the YouTubes! It's growing, and I want to take as many Imgur content creators along with me as I can. If you have a channel you want to promote, be it Twitch, YouTube or otherwise, let me know! Send me a link and I'll promote you in a future dump. And swing by the channel if you have some time to kill, or just need a pleasantly deep voice in the background while you do whatever. Right now, I'm playing Monkey Island 2! youtube.com/@PTGDad
item.dc:creator: PartTimeGamerDad

item.title: Japanese omelet grilled eel rice bowl
item.description: Ingredients 2-3 cups rice cooked 8 ounces unagi fillet 6 large eggs 1 tablespoon soy sauce 1 tablespoon mirin 1 tablespoon sake 1 teaspoon granulated sugar 1 tablespoon oil 1 avocado sliced 1 sheet nori, torn into small pieces, for garnish ¼ cup chopped scallion for garnish togarashi, optional Instructions Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. Place unagi on a lined baking sheet and cook in the oven for 5-8 minutes or until hot. Turn on the broiler and broil for 1 minute. Remove from oven and keep warm. Heat 1 tablespon oil in a non-stick saute pan over medium heat. Whisk eggs and add soy sauce, mirin, sake, and sugar. Pour egg mixture into hot pan. Cover and let cook undisturbed for 2-3 minutes. The eggs should still be wet but set. Remove from heat. Portion rice into 2 bowls and top with sweet simmered eggs and unagi. Finish with avocado slices, chopped scallions, and nori. Sprinkle togarishi on top if desired.
item.dc:creator: wolfwinter
MayMyEnemiesLiveLong

item.title: It's Wednesday my dudes, and lady dudes.
item.description: It was my second year of college where I began to notice a strange curiosity of my female friends at the time. There was no 1 out of 3, or even a 2 out of 3; each and every one of them had been sexually assaulted, 8 for 8. It was then that my eyes were opened to just how out of control this whole world had gotten or worse, perhaps remained. Women I trust that most of you are doing your best, but IF you aren't let this be your sign. Talk to your daughters, your nieces, your cousins; have them set hard lines on boundaries, don't let anyone cross them, and know that sometimes the best thing you can do is say no and remove them or yourself from the situation. Oh and for the love all that is holy, no secondary locations!! Men, we're failing, and all of us are responsible. Because it was our fathers or uncles or brothers or cousins or nephews or friends, and we never checked them, we possibly heard stories and did nothing about it. So talk to all the men and boys in your family and make them listen, DON'T ASSUME IT'S SOMEONE ELSE'S RESPONSIBILITY. Discuss with them that verbal informed consent is a must, and just because you have it once does not make it universal to every occasion or action in those occasions. And this is not to discount the number of cases where the sexes are not male attacking female, but damn it we can only attack so many epidemics at a time. Finally believe the survivors, when they spill their stories, all of them have gone through horrific events and for a lot of them it will not be easy to recount the details for you, or an interview, or for a defending attorney and a jury.
item.dc:creator: Discoball10

item.title: Someone said you have to censor titles now so I’m trying something. FUCK SHIT ASS DAMN COCK CUNT PUSSY BITCH PISS SMEGMA FART DONALD TRUMP!
item.description: Omg omg omg I’m giddy this is the first time I get to do this. Ahem. *Front Page Edit* I can’t believe this is what actually got me to FP for the first time. I was literally just fucking around and testing whether or not anything would happen if I swore in the post’s title. Thank you all. I heard that FP gets you certain things in your inbox but I’ve always assumed that was a myth
item.dc:creator: Roune

item.title: A pose a day: Black female fit model is confused low angle pose reference
item.description: Hi! I'm AdorkaStock. I photograph myself and others in various poses for art reference. My goal is to include in my galleries of stock poses a variety of body types, skin types, and people doing various things so there is a piece of stock for everyone. I want to share my stock, which is free to use for reference, with as many people as possible in case they need it! FAQ is in my bio. Links list if you want to get off this hell site but continue following me: https://www.adorkastock.com/hub Hope the pose helps you! Happy drawing! #Art #AdorkaStock #Reference #Artist
item.dc:creator: adorkastock

item.title: The Story of Coastal Critters
item.description:
How amazing is this entry? Coastal Critters is an outdoor sanctuary for positive, long-term medical, seniors, and feral cats!!
This sits on 19 acres, and they spent millions and millions of dollars on fencing. Everything is kitty-proof, and the rescue spans over 10 acres.
They prioritize scared and unwanted cats who majority come from colonies. They have a great adoption program for friendlies, but typically put all their effort into feral or FIV/FELV-positive cats who are not friendly. This is their inside ward.
They even have a senior section on the property. This sweet blind cat was found in the middle of a highway and was unable to see. They saved him and brought him to the sanctuary. I definitely fell in love—so many times.
Every structure and every building has heating and air conditioning. Ensuring comfortable living conditions year-round. A lot of them came to them untouchable, but over time have flipped and started accepting nose boops and chin scratches. No matter how scared or how broken, they have a place, HERE!
They even partnered with the state of Alabama to ensure feral cats on the beach have a safe place to go when trapped. (How amazing that they chose life-saving programs instead of euthanasia!?) We have a breed of mouse that is endangered and stray cats are among the most predatory animals. Thankfully, they have a really great working relationship, and these cats get the best medical care and a place to live out their lives well, also preserving this sweet little beach mouse.
If I were a stray cat and didn't like humans, this would be the place I'd wanna go. Actually, as a human, this is already where I wanna go and live every single day. There are so many loving cats and so many who are still scared, but have a wonderful place to live their life. I was amazed by the Fencing and precautions put in place to ensure the cats stay within the sanctuary and to keep predators out.
They have expanded and started saving critters, as they call them. These sweet horses were saved from the slaughterhouse to be used in a parade, then returned to the slaughterhouse, until the sweet rescue stepped in and saved them. I love them and will forever think about them. Bravo, Coastal Critters, you were doing an amazing job. #goals
item.dc:creator: AlabamaAnimalRescuer

item.title: I passed my radiologic technologist registry!
item.description: Finally after two years with no breaks, I FINALLY passed my radiologic technologist registry. I’m a licensed x-ray tech now! Everything I’ve worked for for so long has finally paid off!

item.title: Valentina Gomez is so unintentionally fucking funny.
item.description:
This is not even her worst stand.
She definitely didn't lose by a narrow margin. Fun fact, she ran before for Congress in Missouri and finished 6th out of 8 candidates.
Everyone does the AIPAC deals in backrooms, not Valentina.
If insecurity were a person.
No one, not even Loomer answered her.
item.dc:creator: onushka

item.title: She Brought The Receipts. The White House Brought Vibes And A Strongly Worded Relationship With Reality.
item.description:
BREAKING: Journalism briefly remembered its job. ? Kaitlan Collins showed up with receipts while Karoline Leavitt brought the usual White House starter pack: vibes, deflection, and a confident relationship with fiction. Turns out facts still exist — they just have to fight their way through the spin cycle. ?
? #BlueCrew #KaitlanCollins #KarolineLeavitt #ConfidentRelationshipWithFiction
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge
